name: Salmon Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients except the rolls.
2. Blend with a fork until well mixed.
3. Divide into four portions and shape each into 1-inch thick patties.
4. Spray a large nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray and place over medium-high heat.
5. Add the patties and cook until well browned on both sides, 8-10 minutes.
6. Serve on rolls.
